enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on a Saturday, recapping seeing X-Men: Days of Future Past in 3D with his mom, helping her plant a rose bush, watching The Bible TV series at her house, and spending the day working on his website. He also mentions his audiobook listening habits and his cheap beer find at the liquor store.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Good movie with cool action; enjoyed it in 3D
Cheesy and too melodramatic; unfairly portrays Romans/Pontius Pilate as villains
Prefers listening to one book at a time repeatedly for retention, but admits he's too high to follow through strictly
Expanding beyond original simple scope to include time trials and a calculator; will be a lot of work but cool
